title: erigeron greenei
intro: Erigeron greenei, also known as Greene's fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the western United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce pain. The health benefits of Erigeron greenei include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and act as an expectorant to help relieve respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Erigeron greenei can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for various applications in traditional herbal medicine.
